summary: Large interface-module decompilation PR centered on src/melee/if/soundtest.c, with additional matching work in if_2F72 and ifmagnify. It replaced many UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declarations with typed prototypes, added concrete local/static data layouts, exposed ifStatus_803F9628 for cross-file use, and implemented many previously stubbed or documented-only functions. decomp.dev reported +5388 matched bytes, 57 new 100% function matches, and 31 partial-match improvements.
what_changed: Implemented a large batch of soundtest functions in src/melee/if/soundtest.c and updated soundtest.h from broad UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS placeholders to concrete signatures such as void un_802FFCD0(int, void*), s32 un_80300378(void), bool un_80300AF4(int), and void un_80301BA8(void* out).
Expanded soundtest.c with additional dependencies for card/save/snapshot and SObj work, including lbcardgame.h, lbcardnew.h, lbsnap.h, and baselib/sobjlib.h.

Added many soundtest static/external data declarations and partial struct layouts, including un_803FA128, a much more detailed un_803FA258 layout, many BSS byte arrays, extern .sbss/.sdata/.sdata2 symbols, and gmMainLib_8045A6C0 access.

Implemented most of src/melee/if/if_2F72.c, including fn_802F7288, if_802F73C4, if_802F74D0, fn_802F75D4, fn_802F7670, fn_802F770C, fn_802F77F8, fn_802F7994, if_802F7AF8, if_802F7BB4, if_802F7C30, and if_802F7D08.
Changed if_2F72 data loading to use the preserved ROM string lbl_803F9780 = "ScInfStc_scene_models" instead of an inline literal, and added another orphaned data string lbl_803F9798 = "translate".

Implemented several ifmagnify functions: ifMagnify_802FC618 camera/GObj setup, ifMagnify_802FC750 cleanup, ifMagnify_802FC7C0 ground color/default initialization, ifMagnify_802FC870 initialization/archive load, and ifMagnify_802FC8E8/ifMagnify_802FC940 ignore_offscreen toggles.
Refined Element_803F9628 in src/melee/if/types.h by splitting fields into byte-sized frame/sound timing fields, adding a bitfield struct for x12 flags, and typing x18/x1C as IfStatusCb callbacks.
Made ifStatus_803F9628 non-static and declared it in ifstatus.h so if_2F72.c can locate status entries and drive animation/audio/callback behavior.
Added x40 to HSD_SObj_803A477C_t in src/sysdolphin/baselib/sobjlib.h, presumably required by the soundtest decompilation.

Bot report recorded 57 new 100% matches and 31 unmatched-function improvements; major new full matches included fn_802F7288, ifMagnify_802FC618, if_802F73C4, if_802F74D0, ifMagnify_802FC7C0, fn_80300CC8, fn_802F75D4, and fn_802F7670.
smart_moves: Converted header prototypes from opaque UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to concrete argument and return types across soundtest, if_2F72, and ifmagnify, improving callsite type pressure for future matching.
Promoted ifStatus_803F9628 from file-local static data to an extern-backed shared table only after Element_803F9628 had enough structure to support typed cross-file access.
Used small bitfields in Element_803F9628_x12 to represent one-byte status flags, matching code that tests and sets x12.x0, x12.x1, and x12.x2 during animation/audio lifecycle processing.
Preserved original ROM/orphaned strings as named static data in if_2F72.c, which can help data-section ordering and string-reference matching.
Modeled archive-loaded structures and unknown globals with padded structs/byte arrays instead of over-naming uncertain fields, keeping layout evidence-grounded while enabling function matches.

For ifmagnify camera setup, matched behavior by composing existing baselib primitives: GObj_Create, lb_80013B14, HSD_GObjObject_80390A70, GObj_SetupGXLinkMax, HSD_CObjSetOrtho, HSD_CObjSetViewport, and HSD_CObjSetScissorx4.
Accepted some rough C shapes where they improved match progress, notably unrolled player-slot writes and slot-search chains.
decomp_lessons: For interface modules, getting shared data structures approximately right can unlock many function bodies at once; Element_803F9628 typing enabled if_2F72 animation/audio/status code.

Unknown menu/state files may require broad data-layout scaffolding first: padded local structs, byte arrays, and extern globals are acceptable stepping stones when exact semantic names are not yet known.
Preserved strings from the original ROM should be represented explicitly when they affect data sections, even if their only immediate use is replacing an inline literal in an archive-load call.
Typing callback fields as function-pointer typedefs makes table-driven UI/status logic clearer and helps decompilers avoid generic integer or void* fields.
Matching code may intentionally use unrolled loops or awkward pointer arithmetic when the compiler output demands it; reviewers may tolerate rough readability when match gains are significant.
Small baselib struct additions, such as adding HSD_SObj_803A477C_t.x40, can be necessary collateral for matching higher-level UI code.
Where evidence is weak, keep names address-based or generic: this PR retains many un_*/fn_* names rather than inventing semantics for soundtest internals.
naming_conventions: Address-based unresolved functions remain named un_803xxxxx or fn_803xxxxx in soundtest and fn_802Fxxxx/if_802Fxxxx in if_2F72 when semantics are still unclear.
Module-prefixed exported functions use existing project style, such as ifMagnify_802FC618, ifStatus_803F9628, and if_802F7E24.
Global/static labels retain address-derived names, such as un_803FA128, un_803FA258, lbl_804A1340, ifMagnify_804A1DE0, and un_804D6DC8.
Orphaned or data-section strings use lbl_ address labels with comments explaining their provenance, e.g. lbl_803F9780 and lbl_803F9798.
Temporary unknown struct fields use offset names like x10, x11, x12, x18, and x1C, with padding arrays used to preserve layout.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used pointer-difference indexing in if_802F73C4/if_802F74D0: idx = ((u8*) entry - (u8*) entries) / sizeof(Element_803F9628), matching the table-entry to callback index relationship.
Represented status flags as single-bit fields so tests like !entry->x12.x0 and assignments entry->x12.x2 = 1 compile into expected byte/bit behavior.
Kept manually unrolled slot detection logic in fn_802F770C and fn_802F7994 instead of simplifying into loops, likely to match compiler control flow.
Used explicit u8 casts and shifts for player/slot indexing, such as (u8) slot << 1 and (u8) slot << 3, preserving narrow arithmetic behavior.
Used volatile default_val in ifMagnify_802FC7C0 to shape codegen around fallback GXColor/default value handling.
Used exact HSD JObj matrix-dirty guard/assert sequences in fn_802F77F8, including jobj flag checks and HSD_JObjSetMtxDirtySub.
Used ST_MIN macro local to un_802FFEE0 to force a min expression on a u16 field while keeping generated code close.
Used archive symbol/section loads with explicit void**/typed casts where data tables are not fully understood, e.g. soundtest access to ((int**) un_804D6DA8)[5][un_804D6DB4].

review_feedback.comment: Some of this is pretty rough, for example there are a lot of unrolled loops. But I can't argue with the match progress.
review_feedback.lesson: Large matching PRs may be approved despite rough control-flow style when measurable progress is strong; future cleanup can target readability after matching constraints are understood.

review_feedback.comment: Matched code increased to 48.32% (+0.14%, +5388 bytes), with 57 new matches and 31 unmatched-function improvements.
review_feedback.lesson: Automated match reports were central evidence for accepting a broad, rough decompilation slice.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that clean up the rough unrolled loops in soundtest, if_2F72, or ifmagnify from PR2075.
Search for subsequent renames of un_80300xxx soundtest functions introduced or typed in PR2075.
Look for later refinements to Element_803F9628 field names, callback semantics, and x12 bitfield flags.
Check whether HSD_SObj_803A477C_t.x40 receives a semantic field name in later baselib work.
Find PRs that continue matching ifMagnify_802FC750, ifMagnify_802FC870, fn_802F77F8, fn_802F7994, and other partial matches reported by decomp.dev.
